docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00 WAIVER) SERVED SEP-28-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DENT, JEWEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JEWEL HALL IS PRSENT. DEFENDANT JEWEL DENT IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HALL, JEWEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DENT, JEWEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HALL, JEWEL AS TO DEFENDANT DENT, JEWEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALL, JEWEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2017 - JUDGMENT.
